content.description:
REPL introspection functions for runtime discoverability.

Registers four globals on boot:

- **`dir(obj)`** — Enumerate object properties, grouped into Functions / Namespaces / Values
- **`await help(obj)`** — Resolve source item via kernel API detection or WeakMap provenance, show symbols with signatures and line numbers
- **`await help(obj, "method")`** — Show details for a specific method (signature, kind, line, navigation command)
- **`await symbolSearch("pattern")`** — Cross-item symbol search across all code items, with optional kind/scope filters
- **`await symbols("name")`** — Full dump of all `_symbols` for a code item, grouped by kind

## Source Resolution

1. **Kernel API**: Detected via `IDS` reference equality (shared const)
2. **API sub-namespaces**: Key-set matching against `api.events`, `api.viewport`, etc.
3. **Libraries**: WeakMap provenance from `moduleSystem.getModuleInfo()`

## See Also

- [Symbol Browser & API Help](item://c0c0c0c0-0052-0000-0000-000000000000) — Design doc for this feature
- [symbol-extractor-lib](item://ac0ac0ac-0003-0000-0000-000000000000) — Extracts `_symbols` from code items
- [symbol-indexer-watch](item://ac0ac0ac-0004-0000-0000-000000000000) — Indexes symbols on item save
